pi_items.source: task.json line 5 description states 'Create a new Tab/Layout and rename it to Warehouse Map'; layout name is the target for this task
task.json description line 3 specifies /home/ga/Documents/warehouse_plan.png; setup_task.sh line 23 creates file with this exact filename via ImageMagick convert command
task.json description line 4 references 'Entrance Camera'; setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 defines this camera in CAMERA_NAMES array
task.json description line 4 states position it at 'bottom center' of the map (the building entrance)
task.json description line 5 references 'Server Room Camera'; setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 defines this camera in CAMERA_NAMES array
task.json description line 5 states position it at 'top right' of the map (the secure zone)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a facility map layout named 'Warehouse Map' in the Nx Witness Desktop Client. The map uses a synthetically generated floor plan background image (warehouse_plan.png) created by ImageMagick with dimensions 1280x720, featuring labeled zones including 'MAIN ENTRANCE' at the bottom, 'SERVER ROOM' at the top right, and 'WAREHOUSE FLOOR' in the center. Two virtual cameras from the environment setup are positioned on the map: 'Entrance Camera' at the bottom center and 'Server Room Camera' at the top right. All metadata values match the task description and environment configuration exactly.
